---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?
e.g. "When I'm away from my desk I can't see which files Codex changed..."

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or examples from other tools that inspired this idea.
